idea-plugin.name: TermGlyph
idea-plugin.description:
An alternative terminal for IntelliJ-based IDEs — xterm.js 6 with Unicode 11, so TUI tools like Claude Code render cleanly without overlapping text or broken layouts.

Combines a familiar, fast terminal with:
  • Clean TUI rendering — Claude Code's input box, borders, and dense output display without overlapping. Combining characters, wide glyphs, and emoji all get the correct column width.
  • Find (Cmd/Ctrl+F), copy/paste, and a native right-click menu.
  • Multiple tabs plus native side-by-side split (Split Right/Down), like the IDE's own terminal.
  • Dynamic tab icons and titles that follow the running process (Claude Code, Git, Docker, Node.js, and more).
  • Follows your IDE editor theme — background, foreground, and ANSI palette from the editor colour scheme.
Works wherever the Web Browser (JCEF) plugin is available (IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate and most professional IDEs; installable on Android Studio 2026.1+).
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.1
• Fixed "+" new‑terminal action in split panes — now targets the focused pane, matching built‑in terminal behaviour.
• Fixed plugin icon dimensions and location for JetBrains Marketplace.
• README refreshed with an international / general‑purpose focus.

1.0.0 — first Marketplace release.
• Terminal renders via xterm.js 6 with Unicode 11 — combining characters, wide glyphs, and emoji display with correct column widths.
• Multi‑tab terminal plus native side‑by‑side split (Split Right / Down / Change Orientation / Unsplit).
• Find in terminal (Cmd/Ctrl+F), copy / paste, native right‑click menu.
• Tab icon and title follow the running process; OSC title support.
• Theme follows the IDE editor colour scheme; ANSI palette from Console Colors.
• Output batching, anti‑freeze repaints, close‑confirmation dialog.
